summary: Cycle B (2nd overnight-triage fire of UTC 2026-05-23, ~56min after cycle A) ran heartbeat-only. Both queues absent on disk for 23rd consecutive cycle. regen-all clean: ALL CHECKS PASSED, round-trip 0 failures (23s elapsed). Cycle B open at 01:01:05Z initially observed Founder-quiescent tree (last commit c8551dad cron-routine), but Founder shipped v8.23.1 in 3 commits DURING the cycle (01:02-01:04Z): ee6b9ccf feat(caddy-notes) v8.23.1 catalogs design-pass session + eb6f0d20 post-commit cron regen + 05ed1ebc visual-regression final bless. Working tree at cycle B open had 3 pre-existing non-cycle items left untouched (M src/pages/caddynotes.js — Founder's polish-pass draft that then shipped as ee6b9ccf — and two untracked design-pass dirs settings-viewport/ + captures/iter24/). My regen-all produced app-health.html with audit_trigger.sha=c8551dad (now stale vs newest 05ed1ebc); commit it stale-but-honest, watcher post-commit will produce fresh regen. Race-with-Founder scenario like cycle U; mid-cycle honesty addendum appended to journal correcting initial 'quiescent / likely sleep' narrative. Metric-integrity attestation: HONEST — caught and corrected the inaccurate handoff claim before commit. Cron-cadence concern now flagged 7 cycles in a row; the race itself is exactly what the suggested Step-0 guard would mitigate.
founder_action_items: Cron cadence — now 23 consecutive empty-inbox fires (22 of 2026-05-22 + cycles A+B of 2026-05-23). Suggested remedy unchanged from cycles R→A: add guard at Step 0 of overnight-triage prompt — exit clean if no motion in task-queue/founder/, escalations/inbox/, or bug-reports/inbox/ in last 3h AND regen-all last-pass < 60 min old. Would reduce nightly fires from ~24 to ~6-8 while preserving real heartbeat coverage. **Founder decision required (7th consecutive cycle flagging this).**
A8_performance: Lighthouse 65/100 on 1 page (target 75+) — open .lighthouseci/*.html, fix top failures (carry-over from cycles S+T+U+A).
A12_operational: 8/10 cron watcher runs hit skip-dirty — check .husky/post-commit mid-run dirtying + routinePatterns allowlist coverage (carry-over from cycles S+T+U+A).
main-flows.html user-context capture ~7.95 days stale — run `node scripts/visual-audit/founder-context-capture.mjs` before next ship-close (natural drift, not blocking).
quota-status weekly_cap field still null — no % computation possible (preserved Founder-triage item from cycles R+S+T+U+A).

aggregate-fiq-status D40 parity GATE-FAIL — stale-timestamp 89976s (>24h hard threshold) tripped for the first time tonight because FIQ has had zero churn across 23 consecutive empty-inbox cycles. NOT an aggregator bug (status=green declared=26 deployed=26 ran cleanly; idempotent-write correctly skipped unchanged content). Gate firing as designed per scripts/aggregate-self-tests.py:138-141. Remedies all cross Founder-decision boundary: (1) add last_polled_at heartbeat field to decouple poll-staleness from content-staleness, (2) raise 24h threshold to 48-72h, (3) refine D40 parity to distinguish idempotent-skip-grace from aggregator-failed-and-stale, (4) accept the GATE-FAIL as a faithful signal and surface it on dashboard. First flagged 2026-05-23 cycle B post-commit. Will trip on every cycle until FIQ activity resumes or remedy lands.
